description: Eden — Yahweh forms man; divine He in relative clauses
mustContain: On the seventh day God finished His work which He had done; and He rested on the seventh day from all His work which He had done.
there He put the man whom He had formed.
As the man slept, He took one of his ribs
from the rib which He had taken from the man
mustNotContain: God finished his work which he had done
As the man slept, he took one of his ribs
